summary: A vertical screen recording of someone setting up a social-media account profile on a phone-style interface. Early frames show a video interview clip of a woman in glasses and a blazer seated by a window. Later frames show an app onboarding screen reading 'Give your profile a face' with the U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal set as the profile avatar, and a final frame of a cursor clicking a blue 'Post' button.

script.scene: A woman in glasses and a dark blazer sits by a window in an interview-style clip.
An app onboarding screen reads 'Give your profile a face' with the DHS seal placed as the profile picture.
A cursor hovers over and clicks a blue 'Post' button.

notable_text: Give your profile a face; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY; Post
